_comment: Canonical rc: code registry — the source of record for shared root causes. Before applying a new rc:<CODE> label at triage, add a row here so codes don't drift (CHAIN_ID_MISSING vs ChainIdMissing). scripts/find-duplicate-candidates.mjs flags any rc: label used on an issue that is missing from this list. See .github/TRIAGE.md.

codes.description: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy header on the shared App Suite hosting breaks embedded / popup wallet connect.
Legacy 'newton' testnet hostnames still surface or redirect instead of the current galileo host.
Chain ID not set or not propagated, producing wrong-network prompts or unclear errors.
